svg.title: End-to-end RAG system architecture
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the full RAG pipeline from user query through embedding, FAISS retrieval, cross-encoder reranking, LLM generation, and LLMOps monitoring, all containerized with Docker.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a user sends a query to the RAG system?')
sendPrompt('What is query preprocessing in RAG?')
sendPrompt('Why use all-MiniLM-L6-v2 as the embedding model?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS vector search work?')
sendPrompt('Why use a cross-encoder reranker after FAISS retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM use retrieved context to generate a response?')
sendPrompt('What does the final RAG response look like?')
sendPrompt('What does LLMOps cover in a RAG system?')
sendPrompt('Why use uv for Python package management?')
